texto: Introduction to Kate. - Satisfied she had concluded her notes on the manuscript she had been reading, Kate placed her heel back in its shoe and stood up. She smoothed her skirt and paused to spare a thought for Vincent. “What is going to happen next?” Kate remembered him pleading. Claire had said this would happen.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Francine Scott que provoca temas ligados a lideranca. Ao questionar “Introduction to Kate. - Satisfied she had concluded her notes on the manuscript she had been read…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre lideranca, cuckold, erotica, com foco em erotica e female-supremacy.

texto: Introduction to Amanda. - The equal measure of fear and desire her double-barrelled bust induced was plain to see. It might have been a mundane observation but it was something of an epiphany to Amanda just what it meant to be the only person in the room wearing a bra.
explicacao: Citação de Francine Scott sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Introduction to Amanda. - The equal measure of fear and desire her double-barrelled bust induced …” articula coragem, cuckold, erotica em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como erotica e female-supremacy.
